title: Japanese Steamed Egg Custard
description: A traditional Japanese dish made with steamed egg custard, often served as a side or light meal. The delicate texture and flavor make it a popular choice for special occasions.
instructions: 1. Crack the Japanese eggs into a bowl and whisk until well combined.
2. Add the milk to the bowl and whisk until smooth.
3. Add a pinch of salt to the mixture and whisk to combine.
4. Pour the egg mixture into small individual cups or ramekins.
5. Place the cups into a steamer basket and add water to the steamer.
6. Steam the egg custard over boiling water for 12-15 minutes, or until set.
7. Remove the egg custard from the steamer and let cool to room temperature.
8. Serve the Japanese steamed egg custard chilled, garnished with soy sauce if desired.
